name: Repo with no existing environments
prompt: Migrate this repo to GitHub Actions. It has no environments set up yet.
expected_behavior: Detects target repo via `gh repo view --json nameWithOwner`
Detects no existing environments (besides possibly copilot)
Creates all three environments: sandbox, uat, production
Does not error when environments don't exist yet
Verifies environments were created with correct protection rules
edge_cases: gh api returns 404 for non-existent environments — handle gracefully
